description: This file defines the UsersRepository class which handles database operations related to user entities in an async PostgreSQL context using SQLAlchemy ORM. It provides methods for retrieving, creating, updating, and authenticating users, including password hashing and verification.

classes.name: UsersRepository
classes.description: A repository class for PostgreSQL operations related to users, inheriting from BaseRepository.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None get_by_id(self, user_id: UUID)
methods.description: Retrieve a user by UUID and return its dictionary representation.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None get_by_username(self, username: str)
methods.description: Retrieve a user by username and return its dictionary representation.

methods.name: list[dict[str,Any]] list(self, limit: int = 100, offset: int = 0)
dict[str,Any] create_user( self, username: str, email: str, full_name: str, password: str, roles: list[RoleName], )
methods.description: Create a new user with specified details, hash the password, and save to the database.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None update_user(self, user_id: UUID, updates: dict[str, Any])
methods.description: Update user details based on user ID.

methods.name: dict[str,Any]|None authenticate(self, username: str, password: str)
methods.description: Authenticate user by username and password, returning user data if successful.

ctags.name: authenticate
ctags.pattern: /^    async def authenticate(self, username: str, password: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:$/

ctags.name: create_user
ctags.signature: ( self, username: str, email: str, full_name: str, password: str, roles: list[RoleName], )

ctags.name: get_by_id
ctags.pattern: /^    async def get_by_id(self, user_id: UUID) -> dict[str, Any] | None:$/

ctags.name: get_by_username
ctags.pattern: /^    async def get_by_username(self, username: str) -> dict[str, Any] | None:$/

ctags.name: list
ctags.pattern: /^    async def list(self, limit: int = 100, offset: int = 0) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:$/

ctags.name: update_user
ctags.pattern: /^    async def update_user(self, user_id: UUID, updates: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any] | None/
